instructions: For each `[conclusion: CANCELLED]` bullet under `## Failing checks`: the run was cancelled outside Shepherd's control (manual cancel, newer push, concurrency-group eviction). Run `gh run rerun <runId>` only if the cancellation looks unintended; otherwise treat it as resolved by the superseding run. Do NOT confuse these with IDs under `## Cancelled runs` — those were cancelled by Shepherd itself.
Commit changed files: `git add <files> && git commit -m "<descriptive message>"`
Rebase and push: `git fetch origin && git rebase origin/main && git push --force-with-lease`
Do not re-run `gh run cancel` on the IDs listed under `## Cancelled runs` — the CLI cancelled those runs before your push, and your push has already triggered new runs with different IDs.

CI needs time to run on the new push. Single-shot continuation: schedule one session-only follow-up task to run `npx pr-shepherd 42` to recheck once after a fresh delay between 30 seconds and 4 minutes, then end this turn. Do not sleep or rerun inline.
